description_long: This is a rustic wooden cabin with a gable roof covered in reddish-brown shingles and a prominent black chimney. The exterior walls are clad in vertically aligned weathered wooden planks, giving it a traditional, natural appearance. The front facade features a covered porch with a wooden railing and brick supports, as well as a single door and two small square windows. The roof has a moderate overhang, providing shelter to the porch area. The rear and side walls are mostly solid, with no visible windows or doors, emphasizing privacy and simplicity. The overall structure is compact and sturdy, suitable for residential use in a suburban or park setting.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a gable shingle roof, front porch, and brick chimney, featuring weathered wood siding and minimal windows.
description_view_0: Side view showing the weathered wooden planks and the full length of the gable roof, with the porch partially visible on the right.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the covered porch, wooden railing, main entrance door, and two small square windows.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the chimney centered on the roof and the porch visible on the left, showing the solid wooden wall.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying a plain wooden wall with no windows or doors and the chimney on the left side of the roof.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate overhangs, covered in reddish-brown shingles and featuring a central black chimney
attribute_window_arrangement: Two small square windows on the front facade, positioned side by side to the right of the main door, with no other visible windows on the sides or rear
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door centered on the front facade, opening onto the covered porch
